BackstoryDef.title: pipe rat catcher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up hunting the vermin that infested the lower pipes of a Dominion factory district. It was dirty work that nobody else wanted. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it.

BackstoryDef.title: sewer beast tamer
BackstoryDef.description: Strange things live in the flooded lower districts of Dominion industrial worlds. [PAWN_nameDef] learned to read them before [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read anything else.

BackstoryDef.title: ash wall painter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] covered the soot-black walls of [PAWN_possessive] tenement with paint mixed from ash and factory runoff. The corporate enforcers painted over it every week. [PAWN_pronoun] painted it back.

BackstoryDef.title: scrap metal sculptor
BackstoryDef.description: From the waste heaps of [PAWN_nameDef]'s district [PAWN_pronoun] pulled broken machinery and made something from it. Nobody important ever noticed. [PAWN_possessive] neighbors did.

BackstoryDef.title: condemned building shorer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a district where buildings were held together by collective effort rather than corporate maintenance. [PAWN_pronoun] learned which walls to trust and which ones to run from.

BackstoryDef.title: pipe fitting apprentice
BackstoryDef.description: Dominion industrial worlds run on pipes. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up learning all of them, crawling through maintenance corridors that adults could not reach. [PAWN_pronoun] knew the district's infrastructure better than any corporate engineer.

BackstoryDef.title: canteen scrub
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the factory canteen from the time [PAWN_pronoun] could reach the serving counter. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to stretch rations further than they were meant to go.

BackstoryDef.title: gruel ladler
BackstoryDef.description: At the district relief stations [PAWN_nameDef] worked the ladles. [PAWN_pronoun] learned who was hungry, who was sick, and who had given up.

BackstoryDef.title: assembly line child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was placed on a Dominion assembly line before [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to understand what was being built. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the motion of manufacture in [PAWN_possessive] hands before [PAWN_pronoun] learned it in [PAWN_possessive] mind.

BackstoryDef.title: scrap welder
BackstoryDef.description: With a salvaged welding kit and whatever metal [PAWN_pronoun] could find, [PAWN_nameDef] built and repaired the small tools [PAWN_possessive] district needed. [PAWN_pronoun] learned by burning [PAWN_possessive] hands until [PAWN_pronoun] stopped.

BackstoryDef.title: pirated textbook student
BackstoryDef.description: The corporate schools of the Dominion's lower districts teach just enough to make workers functional. [PAWN_nameDef] supplemented [PAWN_possessive] education with stolen textbooks traded through underground networks. [PAWN_pronoun] learned far more than [PAWN_pronoun] was supposed to.

BackstoryDef.title: factory quota counter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] kept track of production quotas for [PAWN_possessive] district's factory floor. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that facts and the presentation of facts are two very different things.

BackstoryDef.title: chemical burn treater
BackstoryDef.description: Factory accidents in the Dominion's lower districts are constant and the corporate medical response is nonexistent. [PAWN_nameDef] learned to treat chemical burns and industrial injuries with whatever was available.

BackstoryDef.title: lung filter changer
BackstoryDef.description: Workers in the Dominion's lower districts wear lung filters to survive the toxic air. [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for [PAWN_possessive] tenement block's supply, learning the signs of filter failure and the symptoms of what followed.

BackstoryDef.title: alley brawler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up fighting in the narrow alleys between the tenement blocks of [PAWN_possessive] district. Not for sport. Not for money. For space, for food, for the right to exist.

BackstoryDef.title: tenement pit fighter
BackstoryDef.description: In the basement levels of the older tenement blocks, pit fights are one of the few entertainments the lower districts can afford. [PAWN_nameDef] fought in them from a young age and learned that the crowd cares nothing for the loser.

BackstoryDef.title: deep shaft crawler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was small enough to be useful in the deep shafts where mechanized drills could not reach. [PAWN_pronoun] extracted ore by hand in spaces adults could not fit.

BackstoryDef.title: tunnel collapse survivor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was inside a mine shaft when it collapsed. [PAWN_pronoun] was not the only one trapped. [PAWN_pronoun] was one of the few who came out.

BackstoryDef.title: contraband garden keeper
BackstoryDef.description: In a sealed room in [PAWN_nameDef]'s tenement block, lit by stolen power and watered with recycled condensation, [PAWN_pronoun] maintained a hidden garden. Growing anything without corporate authorization in the Dominion's lower districts is illegal. [PAWN_pronoun] grew it anyway.

BackstoryDef.title: sewer mushroom picker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] knew every edible mushroom species in [PAWN_possessive] district's sewer system and every toxic one - and the sometimes very fine line between them.

BackstoryDef.title: rooftop lookout
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a lookout for [PAWN_possessive] district's unofficial operations, watching from the rooftops for corporate enforcers and rival gangs. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that warning first requires being able to end threats after.

BackstoryDef.title: junk pistol tinkerer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] built [PAWN_possessive] first pistol from salvaged parts at an age when most children were learning their times tables. [PAWN_pronoun] learned marksmanship by fixing [PAWN_possessive] own weapons when they failed.

BackstoryDef.title: black market tout
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] directed customers to the black market operations of [PAWN_possessive] district. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to read people, identify informants, and pitch the right product in the few seconds available before someone noticed.

BackstoryDef.title: vent preacher's assistant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up assisting one of the lower district vent preachers who spread unauthorized ideas through the ventilation corridors. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to speak to crowds who had been taught not to listen.

BackstoryDef.title: smog kitchen helper
BackstoryDef.description: In the cramped communal kitchens of [PAWN_nameDef]'s tenement block [PAWN_pronoun] learned to cook whatever could be scavenged. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that feeding people is one of the few acts available to those with nothing.

BackstoryDef.title: widget assembler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] assembled small electronic components on a production line that ran twenty hours a day. [PAWN_pronoun] never knew what the widgets became. [PAWN_pronoun] was not meant to know.

BackstoryDef.title: tenement school dropout
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] left the underfunded corporate school in [PAWN_possessive] district when it became clear there was nothing left for [PAWN_objective] there. [PAWN_pronoun] educated [PAWN_objective]self after that.

BackstoryDef.title: ore cart pusher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] pushed ore carts through the mine tunnels beneath [PAWN_possessive] district from the time [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough to add useful weight to the load. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the tunnel systems and the ore grades and the difference between a mine that would hold and one that would not.

BackstoryDef.title: algae vat tender
BackstoryDef.description: The algae vats that supplement the lower district food supply require careful management. [PAWN_nameDef] tended them from childhood, learning the biology of organisms that could thrive where nothing else could.

BackstoryDef.title: gang initiate
BackstoryDef.description: The gangs of the Dominion's lower districts are as much a social structure as a criminal one. [PAWN_nameDef] joined one young, learning the hierarchy, the codes, and the violence that enforced both.
